name: Health Gorilla
description: Health Gorilla — Healthcare interoperability API connecting to thousands of labs and providers for clinical data exchange.

seo.title: Health Gorilla — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Health Gorilla: Health Gorilla — Healthcare interoperability API connecting to thousands of labs and providers for clinical data exchange.

when_to_use: Lab result retrieval API for digital health app workflows
HIPAA-compliant clinical data exchange for care platforms
FHIR R4 patient record access for health data startups
Provider directory integration for telehealth routing
Referral data exchange between EHR and specialty platforms

pros: Massive network of labs, EHRs, and provider systems
FHIR and HL7 support across clinical data exchange
Order and result routing automates lab workflows
HIPAA and interoperability certifications in place
cons: Enterprise contracts and onboarding times non-trivial
Pricing opaque and can escalate with volume
Some connections rely on legacy interfaces under the hood
Developer self-serve experience trails modern API-first peers
review.verdict: A heavyweight interoperability layer for serious clinical use cases — expect enterprise sales cycles.
review.best_for: Digital health companies that need broad lab and EHR reach
review.not_for: Fast-moving startups wanting instant self-serve access

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
